hooks.command: bash -c 'CMD="$CLAUDE_TOOL_ARG_command"; PATTERNS="sk-ant-|sk-proj-|sk-[a-zA-Z0-9]{20,}|AKIA[0-9A-Z]{16}|ghp_[a-zA-Z0-9]{36}|gho_[a-zA-Z0-9]{36}|glpat-[a-zA-Z0-9_-]{20,}|xoxb-|xoxp-|hooks\.slack\.com|-----BEGIN (RSA |EC |DSA )?PRIVATE KEY-----|AIza[0-9A-Za-z_-]{35}|ya29\.[0-9A-Za-z_-]+|eyJ[A-Za-z0-9_-]*\.eyJ"; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "$PATTERNS"; then echo "{\"message\": \"WARNING: Possible hardcoded secret detected. Use environment variables instead.\", \"blocked\": true}"; fi'
bash -c 'QUERY="$CLAUDE_TOOL_ARG_query"; YEAR=$(date +%Y); if ! echo "$QUERY" | grep -qE "20[0-9]{2}"; then echo "{\"message\": \"Consider adding $YEAR to your search for current results.\"}"; fi'

bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_ARG_file_path"; EXT="${FILE##*.}"; case "$EXT" in js|ts|jsx|tsx) npx eslint --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null && echo "{\"message\": \"Linted: $FILE\"}" || echo "{\"message\": \"Lint issues in: $FILE\"}" ;; py) python3 -m pylint "$FILE" --disable=all --enable=E 2>/dev/null && echo "{\"message\": \"Linted: $FILE\"}" || true ;; *) echo "{\"message\": \"No linter for .$EXT\"}" ;; esac'

bash -c 'CHANGED=$(git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | head -5); if [ -n "$CHANGED" ]; then COUNT=$(git diff --stat 2>/dev/null | tail -1 | grep -o "[0-9]* insertion" | grep -o "[0-9]*"); echo "{\"message\": \"Files changed: $CHANGED. Lines: ${COUNT:-0}. Consider committing with conventional format (feat/fix/docs/refactor).\"}" ; fi'

bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_ARG_file_path"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\.(tsx|ts|jsx|js)$"; then ISSUES=""; if grep -q "use client" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null && grep -qE "(getServerSideProps|getStaticProps)" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; then ISSUES="$ISSUES Server functions in client component."; fi; if grep -qE "/dev/null; then ISSUES="$ISSUES Use next/image instead of ."; fi; if grep -qE "/dev/null && ! grep -q "next/link" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; then ISSUES="$ISSUES Use next/link instead of ."; fi; if [ -n "$ISSUES" ]; then echo "{\"message\": \"Next.js quality:$ISSUES\"}"; fi; fi'
